prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of a smiling young East Asian woman in a softly lit office. She has dark brown hair tied in a high bun with a large cream-colored scrunchie, wispy straight bangs, a few loose strands framing her face, clear fair skin, natural makeup, and warm brown eyes looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a cream white fitted button-up blouse with an open collar and a dark high-waisted skirt, leaning slightly forward in a friendly, approachable pose. The composition is a close medium portrait from chest up, centered, with shallow depth of field and a softly blurred office background containing desks, monitors, beige walls, and window light. Use natural daylight, creamy neutral tones, gentle bokeh, realistic skin texture, soft focus, high-detail photography, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of a smiling young East Asian woman in a softly lit office. She has dark brown hair tied in a high bun with a large cream-colored scrunchie, wispy straight bangs, a few loose strands framing her face, clear fair skin, natural makeup, and warm brown eyes looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a cream white fitted button-up blouse with an open collar and a dark high-waisted skirt, leaning slightly forward in a friendly, approachable pose. The composition is a close medium portrait from chest up, centered, with shallow depth of field and a softly blurred office background containing desks, monitors, beige walls, and window light. Use natural daylight, creamy neutral tones, gentle bokeh, realistic skin texture, soft focus, high-detail photography, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖版肖像照片，主角是一位在柔和光线下办公的年轻东亚女性，面带微笑。她留着 深棕色 的头发，扎成高丸子头，并配有一个大号米色发圈，留着轻盈的直刘海，几缕碎发修饰脸庞，皮肤白皙透亮，妆容自然，温暖的棕色双眸直视镜头。她穿着一件 米白色 的修身衬衫，领口微开，搭配深色高腰裙，身体微微前倾，姿态亲切自然。构图为胸部以上的近景中景肖像，居中对齐，采用浅景深效果，背景是柔焦处理的办公环境，包含办公桌、显示器、米色墙壁和窗外光线。使用自然日光，色调为奶油中性色，带有柔和的焦外成像效果，呈现真实的皮肤纹理，柔焦，高细节摄影，9:16 竖版比例，无文字，无水印，画面中无其他人物。
